tools.name: board-fetch-tool
tools.description: Fetch a public soundboard by its URL.

tools.name: board-search-tool
tools.description: Search for public soundboards by search term. Optionally restrict the results to boards that have a text-to-speech engine.

tools.name: sound-fetch-tool
tools.description: Fetch a public sound by its URL.

tools.name: sound-search-tool
tools.description: Search for public sounds by search term.
